description: Golden 100 dataset — 4 categories of 25 questions each

tests.question: What is the targeted total revenue for JD Sports UK in the FY2027 Annual Sales Plan?
What is the like-for-like sales growth target for JD Sports UK in FY2027?
How many flagship stores does JD Sports UK operate, and what is their annual revenue target range?
tests.ground_truth: 16 flagship stores; each targets between GBP 25 million and GBP 45 million.

tests.question: What is the targeted online penetration as a percentage of total UK revenue for FY2027?
What is the estimated UK sportswear market size for FY2027, and what is JD Sports' estimated market share?
tests.ground_truth: Market size: GBP 8.5 billion; JD share: 19.5% (in sports fashion).

tests.question: What is Sports Direct's estimated market share in the UK sportswear market according to the sales plan?
How many new store openings and closures are planned for JD Sports UK in FY2027?
tests.ground_truth: 8 new store openings; 10 to 15 closures (net reduction of 2 to 7 stores).

tests.question: What are the target average order value (AOV) and conversion rate for the online channel in the sales plan?
tests.ground_truth: AOV target: GBP 82.00; Conversion rate target: 5.0%.

tests.question: What percentage of online orders is expected to be click-and-collect in the annual plan?
What is the target number of paying members for the JD Status loyalty programme by January 2027?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for the footwear category in the annual sales plan?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for the apparel category in the annual sales plan?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for the accessories category in the annual sales plan?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for the Nike brand in the annual sales plan?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for the Adidas brand in the annual sales plan?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for own-brand products in the annual sales plan?
tests.ground_truth: Target: GBP 424 million; Gross margin: 54% to 58%.

tests.question: How many shop-in-shops does JD Sports commit to operate for Nike by the end of year two of the framework agreement?
What is the exclusivity zone radius for JD stores in retail parks and high streets under the Nike agreement?
tests.ground_truth: 0.5 miles (no other Nike multi-brand retailer may be located within 0.5 miles).

tests.question: How many exclusive colourway SKUs is JD granted per season under the Nike Framework Agreement, and what is the exclusivity period?
tests.ground_truth: 24 exclusive colourway SKUs per season (96 per year); exclusivity period ranges from 6 to 12 months.

tests.question: What are the trade discounts granted by Nike to JD for core lifestyle, running, and Jordan Brand products?
tests.ground_truth: Core lifestyle: 49% off RRP; Running: 47% off RRP; Premium and Jordan Brand: 44% off RRP.

tests.question: What are the payment and settlement discount terms under the Nike Framework Agreement?
tests.ground_truth: Payment terms: 60 days from the end of the month of invoice; Settlement discount: 2% if paid within 30 days.

tests.question: What is the minimum annual purchase volume commitment at wholesale cost under the Nike Framework Agreement?
What are the rebate rates under the Nike Framework Agreement for the different purchase volume tiers?
tests.ground_truth: GBP 600M - GBP 649M: 2.0%; GBP 650M - GBP 699M: 3.5%; GBP 700M and above: 5.0%.

tests.question: What is the cap on Nike markdown support as a percentage of JD's annual Nike purchases, and what is the value at planned purchase volumes?
tests.ground_truth: Cap: 3% of annual purchases; Value: GBP 19.5 million per year.

tests.question: What is the total annual co-op marketing fund provided by Nike under the agreement, and how much is allocated to national media?
tests.ground_truth: Total fund: GBP 14 million per year; National media allocation: GBP 6 million (Nike contributes 70%, JD 30%).

tests.question: What were our top 3 products by revenue?
tests.ground_truth: 1. The North Face Nuptse Jacket (GBP 530.00), 2. Nike Air Force 1 Low (GBP 300.00), 3. Adidas Ultraboost Light (GBP 280.00)

tests.question: Which brand generated the most revenue in our database?
How many orders were placed in total across all regions with status delivered or shipped?
What is the total quantity of products sold in delivered and shipped orders?
What is the total revenue generated from delivered and shipped orders?
How many orders were placed via the online channel?
What is the total revenue generated through the online channel (delivered and shipped)?
What is the total revenue generated through stores (delivered and shipped)?
Which region had the highest revenue, and what was the amount?
How many orders were returned in total, and what is the overall return rate percentage in delivered and shipped orders?
What is the current stock level and reorder point of The North Face Nuptse Jacket at the Glasgow distribution center?
Which product has the highest stock level at the Manchester distribution center, and what is the quantity?
What is the stock level and reorder point for ASICS Gel Kayano 31 at the Glasgow distribution center?
What is the total count of inventory items held across all products in both distribution centers?
Which region has the most delivered and shipped orders?
What is the retail price (RRP) and cost price of the Hoka Clifton 9?
What is the retail price (RRP) and cost price of The North Face Nuptse Jacket?
What is the average sale price of order items in the database (delivered and shipped)?
Which brand has the lowest-priced active product, and what is the product name and price?
tests.ground_truth: Under Armour; Under Armour Backpack at GBP 45.00.

tests.question: Which brand has the highest-priced active product, and what is the product name and price?
tests.ground_truth: The North Face; The North Face Nuptse Jacket at GBP 265.00.

tests.question: How many customers are in the loyalty tier platinum?
What is the most common loyalty tier among our registered users?
tests.ground_truth: Three-way tie: Gold, Silver, and Standard (each has exactly 3 users).

tests.question: Which distribution center stores the Nike Air Force 1 Low, and what is its stock level?
Which distribution center stores the Hoka Clifton 9, and what is its stock level?
How many total products are listed in the products table?
What is the target gross margin for the Footwear category in the annual sales plan, and what is the actual gross margin for the Footwear department in BigQuery?
What is the target gross margin for the Apparel category in the annual sales plan, and what is the actual gross margin for the Apparel department in BigQuery?
What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for Nike in the annual sales plan, and what is Nike's actual revenue and gross margin in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: GBP 2.12B target, 46.8% GM. BQ: £540 revenue, 45.37% GM.

tests.question: What is the planned revenue target and gross margin for Adidas in the annual sales plan, and what is Adidas's actual revenue and gross margin in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: GBP 1.33B target, 47.5% GM. BQ: £365 revenue, 44.66% GM.

tests.question: What is the planned revenue target for New Balance in the annual sales plan, and what is New Balance's actual revenue and gross margin in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: GBP 318M target. BQ: £160 revenue, 47.5% GM.

tests.question: What is the planned revenue target for The North Face in the annual sales plan, and what is The North Face's actual total revenue and gross margin in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: GBP 265M target. BQ: £530 revenue, 45.28% GM.

tests.question: What is the target online penetration percentage in the annual sales plan, and what is the actual online penetration based on BigQuery order data?
What is the target average order value for the online channel in the annual sales plan, and what is the actual online average order value in BigQuery?
According to the Q3 performance review, what was the average transaction value in stores, and what is the actual average order amount for store orders in BigQuery?

According to the Nike Framework Agreement, what are the expected gross margin ranges for Lifestyle and Running product tiers, and what are the actual gross margins for Nike's Lifestyle and Running products in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: Lifestyle 48-50%, Running 46-48%. BQ: Lifestyle 45.0%, Running 45.83%.

tests.question: What was the running footwear category's H1 revenue and gross margin according to the running deep dive, and what is the actual running category revenue and gross margin in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: £226M revenue, 44.0% GM. BQ: £935 revenue, 44.92% GM.

tests.question: What was Scotland's Q3 performance against plan according to the Q3 review, and how many delivered and shipped orders were placed in Scotland in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: 92.5% of plan, £128M vs £138M plan. BQ: 6 orders.

tests.question: What was the North West region's Q3 performance against plan according to the Q3 review, and what is the North West's total revenue and order count in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: 105.2% of plan, £190M. BQ: £340 revenue, 3 orders.

tests.question: What was the top-selling product by revenue in Q3 according to the Q3 review, and how many units of that product were actually sold in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: Nike Air Force 1 Low, £54M. BQ: 3 units sold, £300 revenue.

tests.question: What was the top-selling running footwear SKU by revenue in H1 according to the deep dive, and how many pairs of that SKU were actually sold in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: Nike Pegasus 41, £8.2M. BQ: 2 pairs sold, £240 revenue.

tests.question: What is the target gross margin for the Accessories category in the annual sales plan, and what is the actual gross margin for Accessories in BigQuery?
What is the planned gross margin range for own-brand products in the annual sales plan, and does BigQuery contain any own-brand product sales data?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: 54-58%. BQ: No own-brand products in BQ (no sales data).

tests.question: What is the total revenue target for the Back to School campaign according to the campaign brief, and what is the total revenue across all orders in BigQuery?
What is the minimum annual purchase volume commitment for Nike under the Framework Agreement, and what is Nike's actual total revenue in BigQuery?
What is the cap on Nike markdown support under the Framework Agreement, and how many Nike items were sold in delivered and shipped orders in BigQuery?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: 3% cap, £19.5M value. BQ: 5 Nike items sold.

tests.question: What is the target volume for Nike Air Force 1 Low in the Back to School campaign brief, and how many pairs were actually sold in BigQuery?
In how many stores is Hoka currently available according to the running deep dive, and how many Hoka Clifton 9 units were sold in BigQuery?
What is the total media budget for the Back to School campaign according to the campaign brief, and does BigQuery contain any data that could track media spend?
tests.ground_truth: Doc: £3.8M. BQ: No media spend data in BQ.

tests.question: What was the online revenue and online penetration percentage in Q3 according to the Q3 review, and what is the actual online revenue and penetration in BigQuery?
What is the running footwear category's full-price sell-through rate according to the deep dive, and what is the actual gross margin of the running category in BigQuery?
